title: Carpophora quadriloba

intro: Carpophora quadriloba is a plant species that belongs to the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as the she-oak or ironwood. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its purported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties.
